description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of large, black-framed windows on all sides, allowing for abundant natural light. The front features a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and wide glass doors that open into the main living area. The exterior is predominantly white, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The upper floor includes a balcony and rooftop access, with visible railings and open windows. The house is surrounded by a variety of window shapes and sizes, arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns. The main entryway is simple, with a single door and a small step, lacking a porch or overhang.
description: A modern, two-story white house with large black-framed windows, a flat roof, and a front deck featuring a pool and lounge area. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with open glass doors and a simple main entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden deck, swimming pool, lounge chairs, and large glass doors opening into the living area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive window arrangement, upper balcony, and rooftop access with visible railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the main entry door, symmetrical window rows, and a simple step leading to the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, open glass doors, and the arrangement of windows on the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple single door with a small step, no porch or overhang, minimalistic design
